# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Source of Truth

For all architecture decisions, implementation patterns, and code standards, **always use `CLAUDE.md` as the single source of truth**.

If there is any conflict between these instructions and `CLAUDE.md`, **`CLAUDE.md` takes precedence**.

Before making architectural suggestions, generating code, refactoring, or recommending patterns, consult `CLAUDE.md` and follow its guidance consistently.

Do not introduce conventions, patterns, or standards that contradict or extend `CLAUDE.md` unless explicitly requested by the user.
